source_jobs.title: (Applied) AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We're building the self-maintaining source of truth for the AI-native company, the context repository that keeps company knowledge structured, up-to-date, permission-aware, and ready for every AI agent.

That takes people who are exceptionally talented, obsessed by the vision, and set on doing the best work of their lives. If that's you, read on.


THE OPPORTUNITY

You'll design and scale the backend that powers a company's brain, the logic that lets AI reason over live company knowledge instead of static data.

You'll own the architecture behind sync and retrieval: turning unstructured information from every data source into a structured, versioned, queryable context repository. Your work defines how AI systems across our customers' organizations reach relevant, up-to-date, permission-aware context in real time.

We're already live with 15+ design partners and launching v1 in Q3 2026. This is the rare moment where the product, the architecture, and the category are still yours to shape. We think of Qontext as a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, and we hire people who feel the same.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Design and implement the core backend logic of the context repository

 - Build and optimize the sync, turning raw data source data into structured, graph-based context

 - Develop high-performance retrieval and ranking, combining hybrid search, rule-based logic, and identity resolution

 - Productize complex logic through clean APIs and modular components (MCP, CLI, API, etc.)

 - Build evaluation and experimentation frameworks that continuously raise contextual accuracy




YOU’LL THRIVE HERE IF YOU…

 - Love distributed systems and high-complexity logic problems

 - Are fluent in TypeScript or Python and have an eye for clean, scalable architecture

 - Turn research and theory into production-grade product

 - Have a bias for ownership and thrive in fast-paced, early-stage environments

 - Are endlessly curious and pragmatic, and care about making AI truly useful




WHY JOIN US

 - Challenge: A genuinely hard intellectual and systems problem

 - Cutting edge: Turning the latest research into a product used at scale

 - Mission: Building the infrastructure for the next generation of work

 - Impact: Shape the company and architecture from day one

 - Ownership: Competitive salary plus meaningful early equity

 - Culture: Deep-tech mindset, transparency, radical candor and fast execution




PROCESS

 1. Get to know each other · 30 min

 2. Chat with co-founder(s) · 30 min

 3. Technical interview · 1h

 4. Take-home case · 3h

 5. Case discussion · 1h

 6. Offer




PRACTICAL INFO

 - Location: Berlin

 - Start date: ASAP

 - Type: Full-time

 - Compensation: €65k - €100k + equity package

source_jobs.title: Product Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We're building the self-maintaining source of truth for the AI-native company, the context repository that keeps company knowledge structured, up-to-date, permission-aware, and ready for every AI agent.

That takes people who are exceptionally talented, obsessed by the vision, and set on doing the best work of their lives. If that's you, read on.


THE OPPORTUNITY

You'll own the core product experience of Qontext: the interface where companies decide what their AI is allowed to know, and how it stays true over time.

You'll turn deep backend logic, a graph-based, versioned, governed context repository, into product that feels effortless. From Access controls that define what each Client can reach, to the Change reviews where humans validate and refine context, you'll build the surface that the entire AI-native company runs on.

We're already live with 15+ design partners and launching v1 in Q3 2026. This is the rare moment where the product, the architecture, and the category are still yours to shape. We think of Qontext as a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, and we hire people who feel the same.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Design and build the interface connecting users, data sources, and AI context

 - Build Access controls governing which Clients and Groups can reach what

 - Ship human-in-the-loop Change reviews for context validation, feedback, and identity resolution

 - Build new native connectors that turn external tools into live Data sources

 - Turn complex backend logic into UI, APIs, and workflows that feel obvious




YOU’LL THRIVE HERE IF YOU…

 - Build beautiful, high-performance interfaces that make complexity usable

 - Are fluent in TypeScript, React, and Tailwind, and obsess over interaction detail

 - Think in systems and flows, not screens, and know how frontend and backend meet

 - Live at the intersection of engineering and product, shaping UX through code

 - Ship, test, and refine fast, with craft and speed together




WHY JOIN US

 - Challenge: A genuinely hard intellectual and systems problem

 - Cutting edge: Turning the latest research into a product used at scale

 - Mission: Building the infrastructure for the next generation of work

 - Impact: Shape the company and architecture from day one

 - Ownership: Competitive salary plus meaningful early equity

 - Culture: Deep-tech mindset, transparency, radical candor and fast execution




PROCESS

 2. Chat with co-founder(s) · 30 min

 3. Technical interview · 1h

 4. Take-home case · 3h

 5. Case discussion · 1h

 6. Offer

 - Start date: ASAP

 - Type: Full-time

 - Compensation: €65k - €120k + equity package

source_jobs.title: Backend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We're building the self-maintaining source of truth for the AI-native company, the context repository that keeps company knowledge structured, up-to-date, permission-aware, and ready for every AI agent.

That takes people who are exceptionally talented, obsessed by the vision, and set on doing the best work of their lives. If that's you, read on.


THE OPPORTUNITY

You'll architect and build the core of the context repository: the database, the versioning, and the retrieval that let AI agents reach correct, permission-aware company knowledge in real time.

This is deep backend work. You'll own the systems that keep context consistent and trustworthy at scale, from File versions and Change reviews to Automatic Change Reconciliation, and the Sync infrastructure that keeps the context repository up to date.

We're already live with 15+ design partners and launching v1 in Q3 2026. This is the rare moment where the product, the architecture, and the category are still yours to shape. We think of Qontext as a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, and we hire people who feel the same.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Design the data model and database systems at the core of the context repository

 - Build versioning, change reviews, and automatic change reconciliation that keep context consistent and auditable

 - Own the sync infrastructure that loads and reconciles data from every data source reliably

 - Drive down retrieval times for hybrid search and ranking at scale

 - Build the permission-aware APIs that expose context to Clients, with security as a first principle

 - Write clean, well-tested code that scales from 15 design partners to thousands of enterprise users




YOU’LL THRIVE HERE IF YOU…

 - Love distributed systems and the hard parts: consistency, concurrency, caching, queues

 - Are fluent in TypeScript and/or Python, with deep command of asynchronous programming and API design

 - Know your way around databases, and ideally graph or vector stores, and how they power the modern AI stack

 - Take pride in reliability and security, and ship features that don't break under load

 - Thrive in an early-stage, low-ego, high-ownership environment with a direct seat at the product table




WHY JOIN US

 - Challenge: A genuinely hard intellectual and systems problem

 - Cutting edge: Turning the latest research into a product used at scale

 - Mission: Building the infrastructure for the next generation of work

 - Impact: Shape the company and architecture from day one

 - Ownership: Competitive salary plus meaningful early equity

 - Culture: Deep-tech mindset, transparency, radical candor and fast execution




PROCESS

 1. Get to know each other · 30 min

 2. Chat with co-founder(s) · 30 min

 3. Technical interview · 1h

 4. Take-home case · 3h

 5. Case discussion · 1h

 6. Offer




PRACTICAL INFO

 - Location: Berlin

 - Start date: ASAP

 - Type: Full-time

 - Compensation: €80k - €120k + equity package

source_jobs.title: Software Engineering Intern
source_jobs.description:
We're building the self-maintaining source of truth for the AI-native company, the context repository that keeps company knowledge structured, up-to-date, permission-aware, and ready for every AI agent.

That takes people who are exceptionally talented, obsessed by the vision, and set on doing the best work of their lives. If that's you, read on.

We're building the self-maintaining source of truth for the AI-native company, the context repository that keeps company knowledge structured, up-to-date, permission-aware, and ready for every AI agent.

We hire people who are exceptionally talented, obsessed by the vision, and set on doing the best work of their lives.




THE OPPORTUNITY

You'll work shoulder to shoulder with our founders and first full-time hires on real product, shipped to real users. No busywork, no side projects kept far from the codebase.

Depending on your strengths, you go deep in one of four areas:

 - Database: The data model, versioning, and consistency at the core of the context repository.

 - Platform: The DevOps backbone: Deployment, scalability, and reliability that keep the platform fast and always up.

 - Product: The surfaces where users control access controls, run change reviews, and shape their context.

 - Applied AI: MCP clients, evals, and the agent workflows that turn the repository into something AI can actually use.

We're already live with 15+ design partners and launching v1 in Q3 2026. The architecture, the product, and the category are still being decided. You'll help decide them.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own at least one project end to end, from idea and design to shipping and iterating on user feedback

 - Ship features across the stack in TypeScript or Python, in the area that fits you best

 - Move fast and keep quality high: write tests, sharpen interfaces, and leave the codebase better than you found it

 - Take real responsibility from week one and push your work over the line yourself




YOU’LL THRIVE HERE IF YOU…

 - Have raw drive and outwork the room, because you want to, not because anyone asks

 - Love distributed systems and hard logic problems, and chase the root of things

 - Turn research and theory into production-grade product

 - Are endlessly curious and pragmatic, and obsessed with making AI truly useful

 - Want ownership and the pressure that comes with it, in a fast-paced early-stage team




WHY JOIN US

 - Challenge: A genuinely hard intellectual and systems problem

 - Cutting edge: Turning the latest research into a product used at scale

 - Mission: Building the infrastructure for the next generation of work

 - Impact: Shape the company and architecture from day one

 - Ownership: Competitive salary plus meaningful early equity

 - Culture: Deep-tech mindset, transparency, radical candor and fast execution




PROCESS

 1. Get to know each other · 30 min

 2. Chat with co-founder(s) · 30 min

 3. Technical interview · 1h

 4. Take-home case · 3h

 5. Case discussion · 1h

 6. Offer




PRACTICAL INFO

 - Location: Berlin

 - Start date: ASAP

 - Type: Full-time for 3-6 months

source_jobs.title: Founders Associate (Intern)
source_jobs.description:
We're building the self-maintaining source of truth for the AI-native company, the context repository that keeps company knowledge structured, up-to-date, permission-aware, and ready for every AI agent.

That takes people who are exceptionally talented, obsessed by the vision, and set on doing the best work of their lives. If that's you, read on.


THE OPPORTUNITY

You'll work side by side with Co-founder Lorenz on growth: sales, product marketing, partnerships, RevOps, etc. Full trust from day one, and clear ownership of projects that are both high impact and high urgency.

We're already live with 15+ design partners and launching v1 in Q3 2026. We're a team of seven in the heart of Berlin, high on ambition, agency, and conviction in what we build. Context is the bottleneck for every company using AI, so the upside is uncapped.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Drive go-to-market: sales, positioning, product marketing, and the experiments that bring Qontext to market

 - Build partnerships with AI tools and consultancies, and run the channels that grow our reach

 - Set up RevOps that makes the funnel measurable and the team faster

 - Grow our presence in the AI ecosystem through events, partnerships, and social

 - Own projects end to end, from idea to execution, and turn chaos into structure where things are urgent or unclear




YOU’LL THRIVE HERE IF YOU…

 - Have raw drive and outwork the room, because you want to, not because anyone asks

 - Are hands-on and get things done, however messy the problem

 - Switch fluently between big-picture strategy and detailed execution

 - Bring energy and optimism when things get hard

 - Want to learn how to build and scale an early-stage startup, maybe to start your own one day




WHY JOIN US

 - Challenge: A genuinely hard intellectual and systems problem

 - Cutting edge: Turning the latest research into a product used at scale

 - Mission: Building the infrastructure for the next generation of work
